name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Just finished
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

I just completed my 2nd debate of this campaign and I want to say "thank you" to everyone that tuned in!

Due to the COVID pandemic and its lasting impacts, I think Iowans are looking for a candidate that will be a champion for health care in Congress. Health care is on the ballot in November, and there has never been a better time to elect a doctor and public health official to Congress than right now in 2020.

[If you agree with our message, please consider contributing $25, $100 or even $50.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=bffffa2584&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks
---
| | | [ ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=070d9c69f5&e=16fac31a0f)
---
| | |
---

name: Steve Bullock for Senate
subject: 🚙YOU’RE INVITED: Join Steve Bullock on the Drive Out The Vote: the Montana Made Tour in Kalispell!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONTANANS FOR BULLOCK
body:
|
# [](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad98a/1224829851/VEsH/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://stevebullock.com/?utm_campaign=scb&utm_medium=email&utm_source=scb-em-header")
Peter, _Montanans have started voting!_

The next stop on our [Drive Out The Vote: the Montana Made Tour](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad98b/1224829851/VEsE/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://www.mobilize.us/stevebullock/event/334382/?utm_source=scb_email_10092020_kalispell/"), headlined by Steve Bullock, is [Kalispell on Sunday, October 11th!](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad988/1224829851/VEsF/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://www.mobilize.us/stevebullock/event/334382/?utm_source=facebook_event_102020/?utm_source=scb_email_10092020_kalispell/")

Get excited to vote by joining us for a socially distanced, drive-in rally, and learn how to get involved in the last few weeks until Election Day.

[Don't miss out! Click below to RSVP and secure your spot:](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad98b/1224829851/VEsC/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://www.mobilize.us/stevebullock/event/334382/?utm_source=scb_email_10092020_kalispell/") | [](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad98b/1224829851/VEsD/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://www.mobilize.us/stevebullock/event/334382/?utm_source=scb_email_10092020_kalispell/") **Flathead County Fairgrounds**
265 N Meridian Rd 3888
Kalispell, MT 59901
Sunday, October 11th
Doors open at 3:30pm, Event kick-off at 4:30pm | | [RSVP TO ATTEND](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad98b/1224829851/VEsA/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://www.mobilize.us/stevebullock/event/334382/?utm_source=scb_email_10092020_kalispell/")
---
Here's how it'll work: RSVP to the event below, and on the day of, all you need to bring is your car, yourself, and your family and friends. We'll give you a spot to park your car so you can hear from each of the statewide candidates in a safe, socially distant way.

Once you've RSVP'd, forward this to 3 friends to make sure they can join us, too.

_Team Bullock_

PAID FOR BY MONTANANS FOR BULLOCK
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [click here to unsubscribe](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad989/1224829851/VEsB/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://go.stevebullock.com/unsubscribe"). You can also [click here to receive fewer emails](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb940b/6aee0046/56167c0d/2e2ad9b6/1224829851/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://go.stevebullock.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Montanans for Bullock
PO Box 199
Helena, MT, 59624
United States

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: This election is still about substance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Our values, principles, and the direction of this country are on the ballot No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xydiiul-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xydiiul-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,After the fireworks of the first one, last night's VP debate was a great reminder of the **_issues_ that are at stake in this election.**From the **Supreme Court** , to **China** , to **socialism** , to **law and order**... what it means to be an American is on the ballot. [Stand Up For Our Values - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xydiiul-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Stand Up For Our Values - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xydiiul-ahkdjtlkr-j/) If the radical socialists take over in Congress, here's what's at risk:
* **Your Trump Tax Cut:** Joe Biden and Kamala Harris promised to REPEAL it.

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: Second OH-01 Debate: Kate Schroder On the Defensive for Repeated Claims That “Nothing Else Matters” Except Far-Left Climate Agenda
body:
Clear Contrast in Cincinnati Enquirer Debate Between Chabot’s Record of Results for Families and Small Businesses; Opponent’s Support for Socialist Sq
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jusitll-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-r/) **Second OH-01 Debate: Kate Schroder On the Defensive for Repeated Claims That "Nothing Else Matters" Except Far-Left Climate Agenda** _Clear Contrast in Cincinnati Enquirer Debate Between Chabot 's Record of Results for Families and Small Businesses; Opponent's Support for Socialist Squad Priorities_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE **October 8, 2020Contact: Jon ConradiPhone: (513) 202-4023Email: [jconradi@fp1strategies.com](mailto:jconradi@fp1strategies.com)CINCINNATI -- In the second debate for Ohio's first congressional district, the focus was on the clear contrast between Democratic nominee Kate Schroder's support for radical policies like the Green New Deal and repeated claims that "nothing else matters" except a far-left climate agenda -- and Congressman Steve Chabot's record of results. The debate was hosted by the Cincinnati Enquirer."Socialist Squad Schroder believes 'nothing else matters' except an extreme, far-left climate agenda, including AOC's Green New Deal," said Chabot for Congress spokesman Jon Conradi. "Schroder's repeated insistence that 'nothing else matters' demonstrates a stunning lack of regard for the thousands of people in the first district grappling with the pandemic, small businesses struggling to stay open, health care workers on the frontlines risking their own health to save lives and more -- so it's little wonder she's based her entire campaign on lies to distract from her out-of-touch agenda.""In a clear contrast with his opponent, Congressman Chabot is focused on his record of results, including securing nearly $3 billion worth of Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) small business support for the first district, directly helping to save 250,000 jobs," Conradi said. "Congressman Chabot is committed to delivering for the hardworking people of the first district and is fighting hard, every day, for the support and policies our communities need to weather the pandemic and emerge stronger on the other side."**SCHRODER 'S "NOTHING ELSE MATTERS" BACKGROUND****In the debate broadcast on**[**Local 12**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-y/)**on October 7 and on **[**Twitter**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-j/)** Kate Schroder doubled down on her claim that "nothing else matters" except for a far-left climate agenda.****Debate, 10/7/20** "'If we don't address climate change, nothing else will matter because if we don't have our climate, our world, our globe, none of us will be here. It's a huge issue in this community,' Schroder replied." (Local 12, [Ohio 1st Congressional District candidates face off in Local 12 debate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-t/), 10/7/20) **This is not new. Schroder has consistently claimed that "nothing else matters" other a far-left climate agenda throughout the course of her entire campaign:**_Schroder: "Climate to me is the existential crisis facing our country and our world. So, all these other issues we are talking about are not going to matter at all if we continue on this path. Like, none of us are gonna be here, so we have to address it. And I do feel very strongly that we have to move to net zero emissions by 2050 and put a price on carbon." -- (Kate Schroder, Bold New Democracy: Conversations with Kate and Nikki, Urban Artifact, 2/18/20)__ _**Including vocally supporting the extreme Green New Deal put forward by New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, that would upend the economy, eliminate millions of jobs, cost every American home $70,000 in its first year and cost $93 trillion over ten years:**
> _Forum Attendee: "Would you support, probably, the Green New Deal?"__Schroder: "Oh yeah"__Forum Attendee: "Yeah?"__Schroder: "Yeah... yeah, I mean I think, I think there are so many things for me it's like what do we have the political will to move on with that. I mean nothing else is going to matter." _(Kate Schroder, OH-01 Candidates Night with the League of Women Voters & Warren County Democratic Party, 400 Justice Dr, Lebanon, OH 45036, 2/19/20, [Link](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-i/))
### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jusitll-kujkulhluu-k/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jusitll-kujkulhluu-b/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jusitll-l-a)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jusitll-961825B2-kujkulhluu-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jusitll-kujkulhluu-z/)

| | **Friends-

** The swamp is drowning your voice.

Nancy Pelosi is so scared of us winning that she dumped $3.5 million in TV commercials for the month of October to run a smear campaign against us.

You and I know the ads are full of nasty lies but the truth is Nancy Pelosi needs just a few voters to fall for her tricks.

[Help us fight back by chipping in $10, $25 or any amount today. With the election 27 days away every dollar counts.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=333A519A1A7029)

They hate the idea that Nancy Pelosi’s rubber stamp will lose if the silent majority speaks up.

That’s why I need every resource NOW from grassroot supporters like you to stop Nancy Pelosi and the swamp from drowning out our voice.

The fact is, our election is already under way. People are returning their absentee ballots and Early Voting starts in just two weeks. This election will be close and if we don’t have the resources to keep our ads running, exposing the truth about Max Rose, Nancy Pelosi is going to buy our district.

body:
A lot of you have been asking me how our family is doing since we grew a little bit bigger earlier this year.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/FJGgk6BYh72vzNObsP47BNhrAWyWHkIi5ugaj8i5OGQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=25)
---
| Friends,

A lot of you have been asking me how our family is doing since we grew a little bit bigger earlier this year. For the past 6 months, Leigh has had 2 little bald guys to deal with. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/pxC2jjZYu6mYTDrO81r2v9LfLp2_M9WXJvjGipmBzdQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=25) | [Click to watch! »](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/pxC2jjZYu6mYTDrO81r2v9LfLp2_M9WXJvjGipmBzdQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=25)
---
All jokes aside, Leigh and I are overwhelmed by the joy Miles has brought into our lives, and are more and more proud of him every day. We can't wait to watch him grow up, reach new milestones, and maybe sprout a little hair.

Like all parents, I want the world my son grows up in to be fairer, safer, and kinder. I am lucky to be in a position to help fight for our community, and create the kind of world we all want for our kids. [**If you can, please donate to help me win in 25 days and keep fighting for all of our families in Congress.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/pxC2jjZYu6mYTDrO81r2v9LfLp2_M9WXJvjGipmBzdQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=25)

_\-- Max Rose_

When Max Rose put on the uniform, he put it all on the line for our country. Now he's one of the most vulnerable members of Congress, and he needs your support to continue putting country over politics.

[**Will you chip in $11 to help re-elect Max to represent NY-11?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/FJGgk6BYh72vzNObsP47BNhrAWyWHkIi5ugaj8i5OGQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=11) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHdFh5IpaU4uxtwWCZ3jpAgp7ks0WbBC7aEVJ591Jos=/FJGgk6BYh72vzNObsP47BNhrAWyWHkIi5ugaj8i5OGQ=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.09_b1_mr_inac&amount=11)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Breast Cancer Awareness Month
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/251117241aa9/breast-cancer-awareness-month?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | **October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month.**

Fighting cancer is hard enough. We shouldn’t be making people’s battles even harder. However, Republicans like my opponent want to defund Planned Parenthood, which provides life-saving mammograms to nearly one million women every year. He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act, which ensures that people with pre-existing conditions like breast cancer receive healthcare coverage.

National women’s rights groups from all over recognize my opponent’s terrible record. That is why Planned Parenthood, the National Organization for Women, NARAL, and HERTime have all endorsed my campaign. They all agree that it is imperative we unseat one of the House’s most anti-women members and protect our healthcare.

**I am in this race fighting to protect women’s rights and expand healthcare coverage.** I believe that in the wealthiest country in the world, people shouldn’t go broke trying to pay for basic medical treatment - especially with a disease as painful as breast cancer. It is flat-out inhumane.

[Can I count on you to chip in to my campaign so that I can fight for women’s healthcare protections on the House floor?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7e13619968&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

subject: Endorsement Alert: Goshen Mayor endorses Pat Hackett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Jeremy knows that Pat will listen to his residents and take their concerns to D.C. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6125967e6b&e=5886ca081d)

---
| Dear Friend,

Another northern Indiana leader has added his name to the long list of people who support Pat Hackett for Congress.

Goshen Mayor Jeremy Stutsman has proudly endorsed Pat as the next Congresswoman for IN-02.

Jeremy knows that Pat will listen to his residents and take their concerns to D.C. He is casting his vote for Pat, and encourages others to do the same.

---
| | [_“I am proud to endorse Pat Hackett to be our representative in the U.S. House of Representatives. Pat is an attorney, teacher, and a small business owner, and has been a leader in our community for decades. I know that Pat has the skills, experience, and character to be a leader in Congress. As Mayor of Goshen, I know that Pat represents the values of our community and will bring our voice to Washington, DC. I will be casting my vote for Pat in this election and encourage all to do the same.”_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9a853812ef&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
As we enter the final few weeks of the campaign, we need your support more than ever. We need to spread Pat’s name far and wide so that when people go to the polls, they’ll remember that Pat Hackett stands for Dignity and Justice for All.

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Tune in tonight for Kirk Cameron’s Special Broadcast
body:
| | Think. Pray. Vote. on TBN
---
| Peter, Join Kirk Cameron and My Faith Votes tonight, Friday, October 9, at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT for part two of the Trinity Broadcast Network’s (TBN) special broadcast, **_Think. Pray. Vote._** My friend Kirk Cameron says it best. “Our nation is at a tipping point. And, with the upcoming election, many of us are focused on the direction of this country now more than ever. With the coronavirus interrupting our worship services, racial division, and politics splitting our families and our nation, Christians need to look at these issues, and more, through a Gospel lens.” I encourage you to gather your family together and tell your friends and church community about this event airing tonight on TBN. Check your local listings for the TBN Channel or watch on [My Faith Votes’ Facebook page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201009com01&n=1) or TBN’s website at [https://watch.tbn.org/checkout/subscribe/signup](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=-5_ba8MAF7Bf135x9C_n0FUUNSMSDH6kEG6_0KXTccxmoTbVXC_2YTsnDPQAl_t5&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201009com01&n=2). We hope you will tune in this evening for a time to refocus and be encouraged. If you wish to receive a reminder minutes before the broadcast starts tonight, RSVP [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icjhge1_2flnyJ6PT0QN3hCAf_1t_xJsqltMJ5ksvsJqYDGcvR0DMezA3s_reY7TZg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201009com01&n=3). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icjhge1_2flnyJ6PT0QN3hCAf_1t_xJsqltMJ5ksvsJqYDGcvR0DMezA3s_reY7TZg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201009com01&n=4) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201009com01&n=5)

name: Rita Hart
subject: Reflections 25 days out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/u3JaYAo6tiVMnkkDKp2ryjy7N6oYbwqA0MgW9_gVm8s=/AoYguAYUgWztq9-T8GO5ChRXyvQsUO8h5kFUJ2TbuwY=?refcode=201009-email) It's surreal to think that the campaign we launched last year is coming to an end in just 25 short days. It's hard to believe that we went from sitting around a table on the farm to going toe to toe with dark money D.C. interests on the airwaves and across the district. We're so close to being able to say that despite all the D.C. interests and other dark money flooding into our district, a candidate who stands firmly against corruption and against party-over-people politics prevailed in this election. **[Can you help us get over the final hurdle as we round out one of the most competitive races in the entire country? Even just $25 would go a long way in a race this close.](https://act.myngp.com/el/u3JaYAo6tiVMnkkDKp2ryjy7N6oYbwqA0MgW9_gVm8s=/AoYguAYUgWztq9-T8GO5ChRXyvQsUO8h5kFUJ2TbuwY=?refcode=201009-email&amount=25)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/u3JaYAo6tiVMnkkDKp2ryjy7N6oYbwqA0MgW9_gVm8s=/AoYguAYUgWztq9-T8GO5ChRXyvQsUO8h5kFUJ2TbuwY=?refcode=201009-email) This journey has been a long one. We've been virtually tied with our divisive opponent for months now, but I'm confident that come November 3rd, real Iowa values will prevail at the ballot box. **[We can't win on hope alone, however. With your support, we'll be able to stretch our voter outreach campaign to reach even more undecided voters ahead of the election. Can I count on you to step up today? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/u3JaYAo6tiVMnkkDKp2ryjy7N6oYbwqA0MgW9_gVm8s=/AoYguAYUgWztq9-T8GO5ChRXyvQsUO8h5kFUJ2TbuwY=?refcode=201009-email)** Yours, Rita Hart

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/u3JaYAo6tiVMnkkDKp2ryjy7N6oYbwqA0MgW9_gVm8s=/AoYguAYUgWztq9-T8GO5ChRXyvQsUO8h5kFUJ2TbuwY=?refcode=201009-email) | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. clean_body: | | | It's surreal to think that the campaign we launched last year is coming to an end in just 25 short days. It's hard to believe that we went from sitting around a table on the farm to going toe to toe with dark money D.C. interests on the airwaves and across the district. We're so close to being able to say that despite all the D.C. interests and other dark money flooding into our district, a candidate who stands firmly against corruption and against party-over-people politics prevailed in this election. This journey has been a long one. We've been virtually tied with our divisive opponent for months now, but I'm confident that come November 3rd, real Iowa values will prevail at the ballot box. Yours, Rita Hart | ****Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Calling patriots to DC to support Judge Barrett!
body:
| |
---
I’m reaching out to you because you live within a reasonable travel distance of Washington, DC., and **we need you to show up on October 12th to show support for Amy Coney Barrett** , if you are able!
[RSVP TO SHOW UP IN DC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLWMzZmE0NGQwYWJlYTQyZjU4NzQ1ZGJkZTFmYmVkYTky%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZUI0dzdmTy1CUVNrbUFCWVJxeXp2RmhKRDBvaUtnY0pZUFF5ZWc0ai1xVkhXY3pRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00Mjc5MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KxxTaPgOIKkNrFAJ16fSLg)
The left is going to have a presence and we need to show up in person so that Republican Senators see that the American people expect them to do their jobs and confirm Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court without delay.

**We cannot be more serious when we say we need patriots to show up on Monday, October 12, 2020 in Washington, DC, to ensure Republican Senators are emboldened.** The details that we have so far are below, and **[please make sure to RSVP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLWMzZmE0NGQwYWJlYTQyZjU4NzQ1ZGJkZTFmYmVkYTky%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZUI0dzdmTy1CUVNrbUFCWVJxeXp2RmhKRDBvaUtnY0pZUFF5ZWc0ai1xVkhXY3pRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00Mjc5MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=6VW60uU83Tdy59I1aq-bjw)**.

* We will go wave signs and show support as Judge Amy Coney Barrett arrives for the hearing.

* There will also be a prayer vigil and press conference, with those details announced later.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Tonight, I debate John Cornyn face-to-face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
and I'll be fighting for you.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e15/2372526721/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | This is it, Peter. Tonight I am going to debate John Cornyn. Voters will finally get the opportunity to hear us both, side by side, explain our visions for Texas' future.

Here's what you'll hear from me: I'm a working mom, and I've worried about how I'll afford health care and pay the mortgage. I'm a combat veteran, and after being shot down in Afghanistan, I have no doubt about just how seriously I'll take my oath to our country. I understand the challenges Texas families are dealing with every day, and I'm ready to serve our country again and fight for the solutions Texans urgently need.

Meanwhile, Sen. Cornyn has spent 18 years doling out favors to his billionaire backers and special interest donors. He spent valuable time downplaying the pandemic, while it spread throughout Texas. Then, he called expanded unemployment insurance for people who lost their jobs due to the pandemic a "mistake." After two decades in Washington, he's completely out of touch with our reality -- it's no wonder he hasn't accepted my challenge to two more debates.

**[Can I count on you to make a double matched donation toward our Debate Day Goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e14/2372526721/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debateday?refcode=email_20201009.1nd__2270__&amount=10") We're looking to raise $100,000 before tonight's debate, and with your help I know we can get there.**

Every piece of BS that comes out of his mouth is being heard loud and clear by people all across Texas.

**Let's show Sen. Cornyn what he's up against.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 (becomes $15)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e0b/2372526721/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debateday?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201009.1nd__2270__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25 (becomes $75)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e09/2372526721/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debateday?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201009.1nd__2270__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 (becomes $150)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e08/2372526721/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debateday?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201009.1nd__2270__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e0f/2372526721/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-debateday?refcode=email_20201009.1nd__2270__")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c84/7f51f7bc/4770ef91/4efb9e0e/2372526721/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2270&amount=10")**

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: The Meaning of Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**The Meaning of Service**

My immediate family has nearly 60 years of military service between us, and my mother is the foundation of our resilience and strength. Through her actions, she empowered me to serve and equipped me to lead with integrity. This ethos of service and sacrifice fueled my service in the Army and inspires my campaign for Congress.

Now more than ever, our Nation needs leaders capable of putting the interests of Americans ahead of their own political ambitions, leaders who will serve selflessly. My mother has shown me what it means to live a life committed to selfless service. **My mother's fortitude and bravery while her three children were deployed to combat zones is emblematic of the selflessness and resilience that can unify our Nation. **

While our Nation is in the throes of discord and division, we must remember the values and principles that unify us as Americans. Despite our differences, we are all Americans first.

Leadership is manifest in what you do for others and your willingness to put the needs of your community ahead of your own. The health and stability of our community is more important than politics. The unwavering strength instilled in me by my family helps me see beyond the challenges our Nation faces today and into a brighter future for all Americans.

clean_body: The Meaning of Service My immediate family has nearly 60 years of military service between us, and my mother is the foundation of our resilience and strength. Through her actions, she empowered me to serve and equipped me to lead with integrity. This ethos of service and sacrifice fueled my service in the Army and inspires my campaign for Congress. Now more than ever, our Nation needs leaders capable of putting the interests of Americans ahead of their own political ambitions, leaders who will serve selflessly. My mother has shown me what it means to live a life committed to selfless service. My mother's fortitude and bravery while her three children were deployed to combat zones is emblematic of the selflessness and resilience that can unify our Nation. While our Nation is in the throes of discord and division, we must remember the values and principles that unify us as Americans. Despite our differences, we are all Americans first. Leadership is manifest in what you do for others and your willingness to put the needs of your community ahead of your own. The health and stability of our community is more important than politics. The unwavering strength instilled in me by my family helps me see beyond the challenges our Nation faces today and into a brighter future for all Americans. **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Peter, we'll keep this short.
Tomorrow marks 25 days until Election Day -- but, with Californians _already_ voting, we need to be reaching CA-38 voters **now.**
From her work as a labor lawyer to her role as Co-Founder of the Labor and Working Families Caucus in Congress, Linda has a _long_ track record of standing up for working people.
She **knows** that, across the country, millions of Americans are struggling to get by. That's why she's fighting for policies that will reduce the financial burden on working people, like passing paid family leave, making childcare more affordable, and lowering prescription drug costs.
[**With November 3rd around the corner, can you _RUSH_ a donation today, so Linda can keep fighting for working families in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/T7i-kI9uVPyWpi7AutCrXDNPAfEihuGdaWh9E--8DYs=/rzb9hhKnSbByYMyzyz3bmjDQ4K9lr3fijLV7__yWzHA=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_100920_25Days)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is what a fighter looks like…
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests in Washington
body:
I spent my career taking on the political establishment as an investigative journalist.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)
Patriot,

I spent my career taking on the political establishment as an investigative journalist.

It hasn’t been easy. I have been banned on every social media platform, Uber, PayPal, and even my bank. All because I dared to tell the truth and I fought back against the establishment.

I am not done fighting yet; in fact, I am just getting started.

**I will be your fighter in Washington** , but I need your support to make it there.

We are about to launch our latest ad showing voters who I am and what I stand for. [**Will you help me get it on the air?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)

Voters need to see what a real fighter looks like, one who serves them and not the Washington elites.

[**Watch “The Fighter” and help me get it on the air:**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)
My opponent has spent her entire life in politics.

She is a four-decade career politician and she has been bought and paid for by special interests in Washington.

**The people of this district are no longer represented by her at all, but by Nancy Pelosi and Big Tech.**

We need a fighter who will stand up to the political parties and the special interest groups.

**Patriot, I will be your fighter.**

[**Help get our latest ad on the air and send a fighter to Washington.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)

[**For every $10 you donate, we can get the ad in front of 400 voters.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396695-934181-5234321-f1d6eb047d-5ab49d940d)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Darin LaHood
subject: We can’t treat this like a partisan issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
The Chinese communist regime is in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=664f8bff86124ff693a49b012e5f9345&_e=EruH8rlfKL9x_QAzb-xd6mY0-6XPOIX3LqUPcPPPs4wtri-F8HzRPkz5am_nLRlbW4mqMhCREDfE8L9iiqHSUtXKhbfzYr_MJUsMRK7jDR_dc75kvV0st3ZrEtdHMpZ21-li_o_2_h1UuUeIOy5Uy4cp34Rv3DSi2_AGv2T4BLp6C00BkPSlhVoFMg8venlG5B55Zr2BlQOXb9Mye8U-Q5BIL7dcXQJae-K10sCzcrkOEe_A5IQv28d_21iitFddWF6eRXBgUG1F5RwvVWvrEeKegFXNNeXHkQ4ZJjR4cHS4Hy8e5A_gZSerqXGuoQb07IZoXfqm857vakSvQPglHn31u4sKvYVPK7Nmb_0B0ZJhmejHmzz8F_eJ4boe63bGndtesH1YsywCkw5_PbIYLJMxezGCsDAMmqzZZ3DIi4DV6SxShrJY7C1qswmM2SgWGremrPXRIMGCE0qIfO88Ooso4CK6DWN8qMmC8XN6ZUk%3D)
|
---
Friend,

There’s no doubt about it:

**China’s communist regime is the most dangerous threat our economy, our military, and our nation have faced in decades.**

Chairman Xi and the rest of the Chinese Communist Party are in the middle of a concerted effort to undermine American strength and democracy in any way they can in order to build themselves up into the most dominant power on the globe, and the last thing we can afford to do is treat this as a partisan issue.
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REIN IN CHINA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=664f8bff86124ff693a49b012e5f9345&_e=EruH8rlfKL9x_QAzb-xd6mY0-6XPOIX3LqUPcPPPs4wtri-F8HzRPkz5am_nLRlbW4mqMhCREDfE8L9iiqHSUtXKhbfzYr_MJUsMRK7jDR_dc75kvV0st3ZrEtdHMpZ21-li_o_2_h1UuUeIOy5Uy4cp34Rv3DSi2_AGv2T4BLp6C00BkPSlhVoFMg8venlG5B55Zr2BlQOXb9Mye8U-Q5BIL7dcXQJae-K10sCzcrkOEe_A5IQv28d_21iitFddWF6eRXBgUG1F5RwvVWvrEcuH5jvCPNyWdHq6nEhrh-pFf_OID4iKOCL4eDIpr6zM4-VuAc61edYQp-zvHk8U2G1NJ_wIzT9Z8urFfaWrB8iZXhqLweUAD_ryEHO_u9ve_FS3VMnZwMlBctwQI1aLQ-EDsddzDRnPwbfuRh3dBEAgIm5ju3CgPWqu8w-hK1M6YJq9U6z5VeSCCx7iTiyqrGY309xjQ0yt3Q3zjy5jBM0%3D)
They’re doing this by infiltrating our universities, harvesting critical intellectual property from businesses of all types and sizes, and holding supply chains hostage which they used against us at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**We’re at a critical juncture as a nation and it’s time to confront their threats head-on. **

_Unfortunately, that’s the last thing on Nancy Pelosi’s to-do list, and she’s even taken her refusal to lead on this issue a step further by barring Democrats from joining the House China Task Force that I serve on._

That’s why Republicans are leading the charge to create millions of jobs by bringing our critical supply chains back to our shores so that pharmaceuticals, PPE equipment, and other medical supplies are made in America again.

**Friend, will you add your name to join us in the fight to rein in China and keep America strong, prosperous, and secure?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: REIN IN CHINA**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=664f8bff86124ff693a49b012e5f9345&_e=EruH8rlfKL9x_QAzb-xd6mY0-6XPOIX3LqUPcPPPs4wtri-F8HzRPkz5am_nLRlbW4mqMhCREDfE8L9iiqHSUtXKhbfzYr_MJUsMRK7jDR_dc75kvV0st3ZrEtdHMpZ21-li_o_2_h1UuUeIOy5Uy4cp34Rv3DSi2_AGv2T4BLp6C00BkPSlhVoFMg8venlG5B55Zr2BlQOXb9Mye8U-Q5BIL7dcXQJae-K10sCzcrkOEe_A5IQv28d_21iitFddWF6eRXBgUG1F5RwvVWvrEVQGcgOH_naYWMBofzsmjBfu2dwtUvY9hseP3T8eRcAqC497Ru2EGNGGW8rETry2Z6M6SGijpsNF9-prS7XDunfSh9zAh5U0X60nbF80N4dZFDnPcCyDr9A2p461FsTSEw4Fz4t01ySJKaxe0Z5A-YibHDUBfbdRE6yzs4Yxb7o2y61rUiJX1x7h2yloVW3wktNjHH3erb8CPbpX3z1vemY%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

clean_body: | = | | Team ― Governor Abbott’s recent decision to limit Texas to one polling box per county is a shameless, meritless, brazen attempt at voter suppression. It’s just another example that Texas isn’t a red state, it’s a voter suppression state. We’ve got to fight this order with everything we can, but this close to the election we also need to be prepared to reach out to voters and make sure EVERYONE knows how to cast their ballot by November 3rd. This is going to take a HUGE surge of resources to accomplish. We need to ask all our grassroots donors ―= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We’ve got to make this energize us even more to turn out to the polls and VOTE this November! subject: Confirm Amy starts now, Pence’s Masterful Debate Performance, D’Souza’s New Film, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20283-2ac8527be65f47f6a3703f9258d5ec27/102/581/ef3e5c15-13f3-4f9b-adab-0ad838305f15)** Next week the Senate Judiciary Committee, under the leadership of Chairman Sen. Lindsey Graham, will begin the process of confirming Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Since the President announced Judge Barrett's nomination, Democrats have been doing everything in their power to slow/stop the confirmation process. They have already begun throwing out every smear and attack they can think of, but at every turn we are defending Judge Barrett against the lies and attacks of the left. The hearings are slated to begin Monday, October 12 and run through Thursday, October 15. During this time, Judge Barrett is expected to be questioned on everything from her views on Roe v. Wade to her thoughts on her Rose Garden nomination event. Regardless of the Democrats' attack, Judge Barrett, Senate Republicans and Tea Party Patriots cannot and will not falter. **[We will stand strong. Hold the line. And ultimately CONFIRM Judge Amy Coney Barrett.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI3OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=q4klHuG0uuIf-ETM0m9OCQ)** [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI3OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Qmn3k_TMH2ejQVKXkyWLsA) | |

Speaking of support for Judge Amy Coney Barrett, there are activities in which you can participate to help pressure the Senate to confirm Judge Barrett!

**First, Concerned Women for America launched their[“Women for Amy” bus tour](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25jZXJuZWR3b21lbi5vcmcvd29tZW4tZm9yLWFteS1idXMtdG91ci1zdG9wcy8_bWlkPTQyNzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XF6xsq5eirvj6YAAZdo4JA) this week**, and Jenny Beth had the opportunity to [attend the very first bus stop in Marietta, GA](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qZW5ueWJldGhtL3N0YXR1cy8xMzEzODc2NDgwOTU5NjcyMzIyLz9taWQ9NDI3OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=y5aDxh1netS1XRgt3wJcbQ) on Wednesday. [Check their website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25jZXJuZWR3b21lbi5vcmcvd29tZW4tZm9yLWFteS1idXMtdG91ci1zdG9wcy8_bWlkPTQyNzkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EkejLd_QX9u46EUsJrzn4Q) for future stops and if you can make one, please show up!

**Second, a bunch of our conservative allies have come together to support Judge Barrett in DC on Monday, October 12** , and if you live within a reasonable travel distance from Washington, DC, please consider joining us Monday morning for a day of action! The details we have so far for Monday are:
* Meet at Union Station at 7:30am at the fountain in Columbus circle.
* We will go wave signs and show support as Judge Amy Coney Barrett arrives for the hearing.
* There will also be a prayer vigil and press conference, with those details announced later.

**Third, Tea Party Patriots Action is calling for local sign waving events to support Judge Barrett, as well asking you to call your Senators.** [See our This Week page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvdGhpc3dlZWsvP21pZD00Mjc5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=3yhhDSgviRzRPu0WDo9oPw) for event dates, sign suggestions, call script and other details! The sooner you organize your local events, the better turnout you will get! And, email us at [support@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org") if you organize an event so that we can help you promote it!

Earlier this week we watched as Vice President Pence artfully destroyed Senator Kamala Harris in their one and only Vice-Presidential Debate.

From the Trump Administration's coronavirus response, to healthcare, to the economy, Sen. Harris was no match for Vice President Pence.

How do we know?

Well in addition to Vice President Pence putting Sen. Harris on the spot about topics she's tried to avoid, including her wish to pack the Supreme Court, at the end of the debate the Biden campaign had nothing to talk about.

They were left with so little success from the debate that they had to try to build their narrative around a fly that landed on the Vice President's head.

After a nationally televised debate, if all you have to talk about is a fly that landed on the opposing candidate's head, it's safe to assume your candidate failed miserably... and that’s exactly what Sen. Harris did.

Vice President Pence was the clear winner of the one and only Vice-Presidential debate.
|

Fidelis Publishing has produced a small but very powerful book about why Donald J. Trump's re-election is so crucial to the future of our nation.

_[America's #1 Adversary](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjgzLTJhYzg1MjdiZTY1ZjQ3ZjZhMzcwM2Y5MjU4ZDVlYzI3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudW5pc29uYm9va3MuY29tL2FkdmVyc2FyeT9taWQ9NDI3OTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=T8myBfQeX6hqm-CRd5viNw)_ was written by 3 of President Ronald Reagan's most admired and respected national security officials -- who helped President Reagan bring down the "Evil Empire," known as the USSR. This book offers a concise blueprint for what we must do in the next four years to prevent Xi Jinping and the Chinese Communist Party from achieving their goal of global domination.

clean_body: Next week the Senate Judiciary Committee, under the leadership of Chairman Sen. Lindsey Graham, will begin the process of confirming Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Since the President announced Judge Barrett's nomination, Democrats have been doing everything in their power to slow/stop the confirmation process. They have already begun throwing out every smear and attack they can think of, but at every turn we are defending Judge Barrett against the lies and attacks of the left. The hearings are slated to begin Monday, October 12 and run through Thursday, October 15. During this time, Judge Barrett is expected to be questioned on everything from her views on Roe v. Wade to her thoughts on her Rose Garden nomination event. Regardless of the Democrats' attack, Judge Barrett, Senate Republicans and Tea Party Patriots cannot and will not falter. | | President Donald Trump said Thursday that he might return to the campaign trail less than a week after his release from a hospital. | Speaking of support for Judge Amy Coney Barrett, there are activities in which you can participate to help pressure the Senate to confirm Judge Barrett! First, Concerned Women for America launched their this week, and Jenny Beth had the opportunity to on Wednesday. for future stops and if you can make one, please show up! Second, a bunch of our conservative allies have come together to support Judge Barrett in DC on Monday, October 12 , and if you live within a reasonable travel distance from Washington, DC, please consider joining us Monday morning for a day of action! The details we have so far for Monday are: Meet at Union Station at 7:30am at the fountain in Columbus circle. We will go wave signs and show support as Judge Amy Coney Barrett arrives for the hearing. There will also be a prayer vigil and press conference, with those details announced later. Third, Tea Party Patriots Action is calling for local sign waving events to support Judge Barrett, as well asking you to call your Senators. for event dates, sign suggestions, call script and other details! name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Pre-K-12 Testing
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we wrap up our fourth week of the 2020-2021 school year, I want to provide an update on what we've seen though our PreK-12 testing system.
So far, we've performed nearly 6,000 tests and have identified 109 cases just through this system, for a total percent positive around 2%. We've run over 1,400 tests on school staff and 4,200 on students. We're continuing to ramp up and do even more testing -- of the roughly 6,000 tests we've run so far, almost 2,500 were performed last week alone. And we're going to keep up that momentum throughout the school year.
Since school started, we've identified 250 cases in our K-12 community among students, teachers and staff. That means that the 109 cases identified through our PreK-12 system represent less than half of the cases we've found, and the rest went through primary care physicians or our other testing structures.
We've set up our one-of-a-kind testing system for all members of our school community - public and private - to easily schedule a test by calling 844-857-1814. That's the best way to ensure both that you can get access to same-day testing and that your results will get back to the Department of Health - and therefore to our school leaders - as quickly as possible.
One of the many encouraging things we've seen since reopening schools is that, of the 250 cases identified so far, nearly half are from students and staff who never set foot in a classroom this year. And that's in spite of the fact that the majority of students, teachers and staff are back in school buildings. Throughout Rhode Island, 95 schools have seen a positive case, and the overwhelming majority -- 69 schools -- saw only one case. That's fantastic. That means in all those cases, we were able to immediately isolate the positive case before the virus had a chance to spread to others. And for those 26 schools that had more than one case, many of them had only two, and these have generally been siblings or other individuals not connected through the school.
By and large, things are going very well with K-12 so far. I want to give a huge thanks to the Department of Health, our designated testing and contact tracing teams, and our fantastic school leaders for their partnership.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, As we wrap up our fourth week of the 2020-2021 school year, I want to provide an update on what we've seen though our PreK-12 testing system. So far, we've performed nearly 6,000 tests and have identified 109 cases just through this system, for a total percent positive around 2%. We've run over 1,400 tests on school staff and 4,200 on students. We're continuing to ramp up and do even more testing -- of the roughly 6,000 tests we've run so far, almost 2,500 were performed last week alone. And we're going to keep up that momentum throughout the school year. Since school started, we've identified 250 cases in our K-12 community among students, teachers and staff. That means that the 109 cases identified through our PreK-12 system represent less than half of the cases we've found, and the rest went through primary care physicians or our other testing structures. We've set up our one-of-a-kind testing system for all members of our school community - public and private - to easily schedule a test by calling 844-857-1814. That's the best way to ensure both that you can get access to same-day testing and that your results will get back to the Department of Health - and therefore to our school leaders - as quickly as possible. One of the many encouraging things we've seen since reopening schools is that, of the 250 cases identified so far, nearly half are from students and staff who never set foot in a classroom this year. And that's in spite of the fact that the majority of students, teachers and staff are back in school buildings. Throughout Rhode Island, 95 schools have seen a positive case, and the overwhelming majority -- 69 schools -- saw only one case. That's fantastic. That means in all those cases, we were able to immediately isolate the positive case before the virus had a chance to spread to others. And for those 26 schools that had more than one case, many of them had only two, and these have generally been siblings or other individuals not connected through the school. By and large, things are going very well with K-12 so far. I want to give a huge thanks to the Department of Health, our designated testing and contact tracing teams, and our fantastic school leaders for their partnership. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Poll Watchers, Early Voting, 25 Days Until Election Day!!
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2590)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | With just 25 days until Election Day, we NEED YOUR HELP to do everything we can to ensure safe, secure elections this November!

BECOME A POLL WATCHER. Citizen engagement in our local elections is critical. We've had overwhelming feedback from patriots around the country who've called their counties to volunteer for duty this election cycle, ranging from reports of successful placements to dead ends and no follow-up. Don't give up – keep pressing on! If you haven't heard from your county, the next step is call your party! Ask to be connected with whoever is overseeing the ballot security effort. Let them know you are willing to serve!

Remember that every state's statutes are different. Each party's ballot security plans are different. You can find party information on our [In Your State page](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2591). If you live in Wisconsin, there is a critical need for poll watchers! Check our [Wisconsin Voter Guide](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZkZXRhaWwlMkZXaXNjb25zaW4lMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2592) to find the info to call your county or party and contact them today – time is of the essence! Once you get your assignment, [let us hear from you](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5hY3RpdmVob3N0ZWQuY29tJTJGZiUyRjMy&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2593) so we can stay connected with late-breaking news and other forms of support!

VOTE EARLY IN PERSON. Early voting has already started in some states around the country. The best way to ensure your vote counts in this election is to vote early in person at the polls. You can find out when, where, and how to vote in your county from our [State-by-State Voter Guides](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2591). If you receive a mailed ballot and do not want to use it, you should bring it with you and surrender it at the polling location. Share this information with your family and friends and other voters in your community.

We are all in this together – join us, and take action! Visit [truethevote.org/action](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZhY3Rpb24lMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=264A567A20A2594) for other ways to get involved.

Onward!
Catherine Engelbrecht

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | With just 25 days until Election Day, we NEED YOUR HELP to do everything we can to ensure safe, secure elections this November! BECOME A POLL WATCHER. Citizen engagement in our local elections is critical. We've had overwhelming feedback from patriots around the country who've called their counties to volunteer for duty this election cycle, ranging from reports of successful placements to dead ends and no follow-up. Don't give up – keep pressing on! If you haven't heard from your county, the next step is call your party! Ask to be connected with whoever is overseeing the ballot security effort. Let them know you are willing to serve! Remember that every state's statutes are different. Each party's ballot security plans are different. You can find party information on our . If you live in Wisconsin, there is a critical need for poll watchers! Check our to find the info to call your county or party and contact them today – time is of the essence! Once you get your assignment, so we can stay connected with late-breaking news and other forms of support! VOTE EARLY IN PERSON. Early voting has already started in some states around the country. The best way to ensure your vote counts in this election is to vote early in person at the polls. You can find out when, where, and how to vote in your county from our . If you receive a mailed ballot and do not want to use it, you should bring it with you and surrender it at the polling location. Share this information with your family and friends and other voters in your community. We are all in this together – join us, and take action! Visit for other ways to get involved. Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht | | | | | OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE & TRUE: | | | | | | | NEW EPISODE: EP. 21 | Meltdown, Montana, Militias, Physics, and The Election Subscribe to the podcast today to get notified as soon as new episodes post: | | | | | | | | CATCH UP ON PREVIOUS PODCAST EPISODES: | | | | | | | EP. 20 | Mass Mail Mayhem: 2020 Election Goes Postal | | | | | | | | | | EP. 19 | Three To-Dos For Your Voter Registration in 2020 | | | | | | | | | | EP. 18 | How To Vote in 2020: State by State Guides | | | | | | | | IN THE NEWS | | | | | | CATHERINE ENGELBRECHT JOINS GLENN BECK'S BEST OF PROGRAM Catherine Engelbrecht, founder and president of True the Vote, joined The Blaze's Glenn Beck Program to discuss how Biden’s Texas political director was implicated in a mail-in ballot scheme. | | | | | | | | | DEBBIE D'SOUZA WARNS SOCIALIST MOVEMENT IN VENEZUELA IS HAPPENING IN AMERICA IN TRUE THE VOTE INFOMERCIAL Debbie D'Souza shares her story as a Venezuelan-born American citizen and how she followed all of the happenings in Venezuela from freedom and prosperity to to socialism and despair. | | | | | | | TRUE THE VOTE CONTINUES FIGHT TO PROTECT VOTERS' RIGHTS In this episode of the podcast, Catherine Engelbrecht discusses the massive mail-in ballot disaster happening around the country, the fierce battle for Montana and America's legal future, the Left's attempt to spin a good-hearted veteran-led election integrity effort into voter intimidation story, and more. | | | | | | | | | EAGLE FORUM FEATURES CATHERINE ENGELBRECHT IN AMERICA ON THE BRINK True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht joined the Eagle Countdown to lay out the all the facts about voter fraud and how it corrupts our elections from the inside out. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Accepts Invitation to Open, Nonpartisan Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Wesley Hunt Accepts Debate Hosted By Nonpartisan Coalition of Local Leaders**

Houston, TX - Today, Wesley Hunt, the Republican nominee running for Texas' 7th Congressional District, formally accepted an invitation to participate in a debate hosted by the 6 Mayors of the Memorial Villages. This non-partisan coalition of local leaders has extended invitations to both Wesley Hunt and Representative Lizzie Fletcher and has offered to host an open debate as Election Day approaches. Current plans are for the debate to be held at an outdoor, socially-distanced venue and to be moderated by a neutral party.

_"The residents of the Texas' 7th District have a right to hear their candidates candidly debate the issues and explain their views on topics important to the District," _**said Hunt.**_ "And that's why I strongly support participating in this open, televised debate. I would like to thank this nonpartisan group of local leaders for their interest in serving the 7th District and in ensuring voters have access to all the information they need to make their decision at the ballot box. I am honored to accept this invitation and I hope my opponent Representative Lizzie Fletcher will do the same."_

Hunt is a Houston native and battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. Hunt has previously challenged Fletcher to debate, with no response from the Fletcher campaign. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.

###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=ed0a889fe13a4333912365d74db416ca&_e=Sof27036WHmktUetWK6hSYq5YvOv90fUYHxCDQzNA6v-M6v5dLEcZO8YHraOW8kNBEoq8MD6v79waMjU-ABoMa1xVInlrve4xYVCWmKdnRItW8-uDE3ZPgPcuMHCxvX-pN70tTENahM99E59v_ed0jXEhpm2gJcsmBTonSRNkRHHu6TRm1sQ7MH4mWJwomhCnnzXscNTBeW9iBXMPDctykBHeOm6V3HR65Gtz3cg4KzQeATrhsE3OPemCIcXTNHJXRYuu37JpHftFpXs2QEkthmKdoi56ixCFXMhxRWpRrs%3D)****

clean_body: Friends, This is yet another example of Washington Democrats meddling in our election to keep Tom O’Halleran in AZ-01. In fact, Pelosi is so desperate to keep him there that she’s manufacturing lies about me and my record. Unfortunately, this low blow is not a surprise. This ad includes bold-faced LIES about my record and even features deceptive, altered video footage of me discussing the Affordable Care Act. As a cancer survivor and mom to a Type-1 diabetic, I understand how important protecting pre-existing conditions really is. I’ve even promised that in Congress, I will NEVER support pulling out the rug from ANYONE and will fight for coverage for pre-existing conditions in any healthcare reform. Friends, I need your help fighting back against these attacks. Can you join me in standing strong and fighting back NOW? name: Bill Olson
subject: Puerto Ricans for Trump!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

Hi Peter,

Florida's 9th District has over 1/3 of the Puerto Ricans in Florida- and they will vote for me and President Trump!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I won because I support the President, and I will win the crucial Puerto Rican vote in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg
!

The Left always curses Republicans for winning the Hispanic vote in Florida. And why shouldn't we? We have done far more for the various Hispanic communities than the Dems have.

That is why President Trump will win Florida. And it is why I will win Florida's 9th District!

Florida's 9th is home to hundreds of thousands of Puerto Ricans- 1/3 of the total in Florida. In fact, one of my primary rivals is of Puerto Rican descent- and he has endorsed me!

Perhaps you may not have heard of the big news this week:

Puerto Rico Gov. Wanda Vázquez Garced (R) on Tuesday threw her support behind President Trump's bid for a second term and called on Puerto Ricans to cast their votes for him on Election Day.

“I ask all Puerto Ricans who are listening to go vote,” the governor said in an interview on Telemundo. “They have to go to vote, exercise their right to vote and evaluate who has represented being a person who thinks about Puerto Ricans and their needs at the most difficult moment. It is Donald Trump.”

According to the Puerto Rican newspaper El Nuevo Día, Vázquez Garced was scheduled to appear at a campaign event with Trump in central Florida last Friday, with the governor saying she had been invited to travel on Air Force One to hold a meeting on Puerto Rico.

Add all this up, and what does it mean? It means that Trump and Olson are headed to victory in Florida this year!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

I will say this for 2020, it has not been boring. But it has shown ALL the American people how important it is to vote Republican this Fall.

After all, Leftists are burning cities and assassinating cops. Who wants that? Most people aren't crazy like AOC, it turns out.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

The Puerto Rican community is alongside us. Trump will carry my district, and we need to get rid of Leftist Darren Soto. He claims to help Puerto Rico, but the only person he ever helps is himself- and maybe Nancy Pelosi!

I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

Trump needs Florida. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade. If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. That's why we must win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg
today? We need to stay up on TV- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hyJKqIT8cF6OuRU&b=GzjPcc8GUwBihJmPB3B2fg
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

But Washington Republicans are throwing everything they can at us in a desperate attempt to cling to this seat, and we need to ensure that we have the resources to continue running the type of campaign we need to win this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s win this, Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. body:
Election Day is nearing and time is running out to get candidates the funds they need to ensure victory. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7ed5d54769a8488bb53849f10227e6d3&_e=pJXZ_vypBen1MtujYdWisca5F1qWYFUN_LLlCtGvvjRXbz9LnVLmPIMEFxlXVbJlV08_0PT_Lk4APaIYXZnqXNvM01MjJHHsdfDtZopLxa9PHNydUKXSi3gaLf5dB00NBBx4LG_qlfHX76UUs7sEoA0RALfbn-G7C-EJpJLVcGtW7PYENGb1pHDTbahuJR0VozFWHYi1R29yDr5vjaTGTtYTDXJKWyp8RMSBaZp9Fh-W4wdPZFByGtIrbfkfmvks86-gXqaDxpHeA0p3Ehm7lw%3D%3D) | |

Peter - Election Day is nearing and time is running out to get candidates the funds they need to ensure victory.

There is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the "[Problem Solvers Caucus.](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7ed5d54769a8488bb53849f10227e6d3&_e=pJXZ_vypBen1MtujYdWisYfE0z5fnenGytSglgab8wBwiih66nJcR196cpSfIGF3ait7Nd5VhGUde4WKZyqUpj57QGjBHQe8raqE2YwwJlqAps2Vd8HlJy846o9DS-fgWyqck1ktWJioBUB5gsVd_fn150G-u-Ij2vt8VOR1r3hgnayW06xzq2oxGamAcbLSaouLwEJoHJRurtlrIDrPkPkvIabeXU9RiRHkgPW830cBNq7rImXhAhOCKs34C-ZZuCYtkxPWMEMDd_UekqjdHjsu_pK7syJNi__elQbDrds%3D)" They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again.

The program we launched recently aims to raise the funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns.

**Thanks to so many supporters like you, we've already raised more than $15,000 for this effort.[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 more for the final sprint](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7ed5d54769a8488bb53849f10227e6d3&_e=pJXZ_vypBen1MtujYdWisSx11TUrkAnHGc_4x7FI57jo9_n3qBuVLehHQlaQTcyzt_SDN_UEj_U0yz8s4IoktSpbuBXFxKdvd3Xywm3fZUmQqBjLqiijHBpRPIQ7UAsqNnLcQyAMXWKokp09mrY1J2XvPoEnXBVnjmkhEYzDTXn5ylPY_H7_K_Z1olKa6H_JR2I4Gu6nL2lKGlJbVfb9xA-YDzNJvsJApf1IW40jQWW8bVj6k3XYaVJRMFp4QHV6ULHL94guOZqNgzcYHAB3o4zHnC25OiOLdBsUekPp5ZY%3D)**.

These members are doing good and important service for our country and with your help, we can ensure they can keep it up. **[Will you consider making a donation right now to help us hit our goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7ed5d54769a8488bb53849f10227e6d3&_e=pJXZ_vypBen1MtujYdWisSx11TUrkAnHGc_4x7FI57jo9_n3qBuVLehHQlaQTcyzt_SDN_UEj_U0yz8s4Ioktcop9z_36VVFlWaKsWM-Lcta4YQ8nY-C7fHtsnJbNHs5ppl97UFsOHGr3rAylBmdFtl0Hk7dnQO69L8UBEAwjPXb8F6URbD6u4wHWI71JDeOBaMTmpW23ANSj3hD15Fxqtu6GOUwjdWmWSe2KutZ7oCPVF2fSd8cdoWGtntbtc3qYoP0jT1-G35po6vno8yiOkDrjmf9KSKWRNZRpzd8tdY%3D)**
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=7ed5d54769a8488bb53849f10227e6d3&_e=pJXZ_vypBen1MtujYdWisSx11TUrkAnHGc_4x7FI57jo9_n3qBuVLehHQlaQTcyzt_SDN_UEj_U0yz8s4IoktSrgMk8FiSeQOrERWnQxJdVDManzPKoRYQjIXx6bASd3PxZ7D1R93nVk5d3XFrV8CenjSWM2jwZ5oCHPOMiJYKXv-dffEso_1pBqbs0KWmRET9rqKWHcF9AXFi033jRdXKXV1KxUaf2mfFEbgrwOGS-LJH07tTIMsyJYravHzpEXzri30IFzaJNIGHB3CGqUg6Nuo4KodlU_JeCFGUfchzw%3D)
Thank you for your ongoing support!

-John

subject: READ: Iowans are pushing back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Over the past few days, as news broke showing... |
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Over the past few days, as news broke showing **_tens of millions of dollars_** from outside of Iowa pouring in to Democrats across the state, we asked for help from conservatives like you to fight back against this outside influence – and we received an inspiring response, but we aren’t done yet.
---
| [Click here to join us!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=abc3c9f985&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to join us!")
---
| People across Iowa have come together to say they’ve had enough, and that they’re tired of “progressives” from California and Massachusetts funneling millions of dollars into Iowa in order to buy our votes, install their candidates, and silence our voices. Iowans are fighting back, and our team is proud to be a part of that fight, but the battle isn’t won yet.

If you’re tired of seeing millions of dollars in attack ads financed by people that don’t care about Iowa, join us. Click the link below and chip in whatever you can, whether it be $1, $100, or anything in between. Every dollar counts and every voice matters.
---
| [Click here to chip in!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=359cf4f304&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in!")
---
| Seeing folks like you and others across Iowa come together to make a difference for our state and for our country is truly inspiring, and it’s that collective action that will help deliver a WIN come November 3rd – so from our entire team, THANK YOU!

-Team Feenstra
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Our Day of Action Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Early Voting is just 3 days away, and we need your help sharing our message with friends and neighbors throughout Texas' 7th District. Please join us tomorrow, Saturday, October 10th at 10:00am for some block walking, phone banking and text banking to spread the word about our campaign.

Houston voters have a big choice to make in November and the differences between Wesley Hunt and his opponent have never been more clear. While his opponent has voted with Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time, Wesley is committed to protecting our energy workers and Houston families from the dangerous ramifications of the _Green New Deal_ , increasing competition in the health insurance marketplace to lower costs for Houston families, and working with our law enforcement to build trust and stability in our communities.

As 7th District residents prepare to head to the polls, help us share Wesley's message and encourage residents to elect Wesley to Congress!

_**Where**_ : Hunt Headquarters, 11511 Katy Freeway, Suite 105, Houston, Texas 77079

_**When**_ : Saturday, October 10, 10:00am

_**What**_ : Phone banking, text banking, and block walking

If you plan to attend, please email info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We hope to see you tomorrow!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=177a7f542eeb46e3a96663dca05cd0f2&_e=h4VkLTsd0FL5G8T9Grob_PQo0gmt4r5aGmlsWmYJJkq3h66VPJJ7ELtaZtJkA3IaVUvDmVrGraQ7iSFHgi_nv6zz7wDWCa4BUIL-SyKFW3yilu9owZuYYIFpArFDt_zTUEBX8g6gfNiprOb1P4hH56DDPxfFahqaI2AvdIgb2LBqu3cjFEpWwuMhmSIlazOxhPl4egW45E6-P-Fedin45a4FZxwajR-6WtV_J9VioX64Ryu7grb-sGKHSISenOdfrGIdQJd9Nn2uClnmBQA5PPXimHGaCHKNoi4xKAI24U0%3D)****

subject: 🚨 NEW STUDY: Texting friends to vote boosts turnout by 8.3% 🚨
body:
Read the results of the largest-ever study on relational organizing, conducted by Outvote and Columbia University. | | |
---
| | | | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2477ecb547&e=0aad15100c)
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
|
---
|
---
|
**This Week in Democracy:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=f7c2578a58&e=0aad15100c)
---
Outvote is proud to announce the results of the **largest relational organizing study to date** , which was conducted alongside Columbia University’s Data Science Institute during the 2018 midterms. This robustly-designed investigation into the efficacy of relational organizing offered tremendous validation that relational organizing is the single most effective way for campaigns to mobilize voters. **A text message from a friend increased likelihood to vote by 8.3 percentage points, far exceeding turnout effects from traditional organizing methods**.
| [READ MORE](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=5c284e4a19&e=0aad15100c "READ MORE")

_10.07.20 | Los Angeles Times_
The latest in the race toward Election Day.

---
The BREATHE Act is a modern-day Civil Rights Act that reimagines public safety and community care to defend Black lives. Show your support by [becoming a community co-sponsor ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=67a8d97a8d&e=0aad15100c)today.

First Vice Presidential Debate, 10.07.20

name: Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager
subject: NEW ENDORSEMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Washington Post Editorial Board just endorsed Mark Warner.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da48/53d9897e/55abb441/1c88f196/3964351843/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-endorsement?refcode=20201009_f_1_nd__861__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Happy Friday, Derek!

I've got some great news to share with you. The Washington Post Editorial Board just endorsed Sen. Warner for re-election.

I hope you'll take a moment to read the endorsement below and consider making a [**donation to help our get-out-the-vote efforts so we can finish strong.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da48/53d9897e/55abb441/1c88f195/3964351843/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-endorsement?refcode=20201009_f_1_nd__861__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

_In 12 years on Capitol Hill, Sen.**Mark R. Warner** (D-Va.) has staked a legitimate claim as one of the more effective, constructive and genuinely bipartisan lawmakers in Congress. In a place where grandstanding, pandering and interparty venom are nearly normal, Mr. Warner is frequently the grown-up in the room, a measured and substantive Democrat who has forged partnerships with key Republican colleagues. Virginians would do well to reelect him this year to a third term in the Senate, and we endorse him. _
_-- Washington Post Editorial Board_

Thank you so much for your support -- we couldn't do this without you!

-- Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager

P.S. Read the full endorsement [**here**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da48/53d9897e/55abb441/1c88f194/3964351843/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/editorial-board-endorses-mark-warner/2020/10/08/ee6deb1e-0368-11eb-897d-3a6201d6643f_story.html")!

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da48/53d9897e/55abb441/1c88f193/3964351843/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-endorsement?refcode=20201009_f_1_nd__861__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da48/53d9897e/55abb441/1c88f192/3964351843/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")
