In a place where grandstanding, pandering and interparty venom are nearly normal, Mr. Warner is frequently the grown-up in the room, a measured and substantive Democrat who has forged partnerships with key Republican colleagues. Virginians would do well to reelect him this year to a third term in the Senate, and we endorse him. -- Washington Post Editorial Board Thank you so much for your support -- we couldn't do this without you! -- Bruce, Team Warner Campaign Manager P.S. Read the full endorsement ""! "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Thousands of Health Experts Sign Declaration Calling for End to Lockdown, Warn of ‘Irreparable Damage’; Return Respect to Nomination Process... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65d44243a3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Thousands of Health Experts Sign Declaration Calling for End to Lockdown, Warn of ‘Irreparable Damage’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e02de6daec&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Daily Wire_
“Thousands of medical and public health experts have signed on to a declaration calling for an end to lockdown policies in favor of a more targeted approach to combatting the coronavirus pandemic,” Tim Pearce writes. “As infectious disease epidemiologists and public health scientists we have grave concerns about the damaging physical and mental health impacts of the prevailing COVID-19 policies,” the declaration states.
---
|
---
| [**Return Respect to Nomination Process**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ccb8aeb6f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Northwest Arkansas Democrat-Gazette_
“We should not allow the toxic politics of recent Supreme Court nominations to turn this nomination into a partisan circus. Judge Barrett and our country deserve a fair and respectful hearing,” Arkansas Lt. Governor Tim Griffin writes. “In a less polarized time, a nominee as eminently qualified as Judge Barrett would receive a nearly unanimous vote for confirmation.”
---
|
---
| [**Schools Aren’t Super-Spreaders**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0c6c37489&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Atlantic_
Across the United States, “fear and bad press slowed down or canceled school reopenings,” Brown University economist Emily Oster writes. “It’s now October. We are starting to get an evidence-based picture of how school reopenings and remote learning are going . . . Schools do not, in fact, appear to be a major spreader of COVID-19.”
---
|
---
| [**In Afghanistan, As We Enter Our 20th Year, It's Time to Come Home**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81fd5949b6&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“As someone who volunteered for service, fought in Afghanistan, and watched good friends give their lives for the mission there, it’s difficult to accept that 19 years hasn’t been enough. As President Donald Trump signaled on Twitter on Wednesday American involvement in the Afghan conflict should end, our service members should come back to their families, and our country should move forward,” Nate Anderson writes.
---
|
---
| [**National Association of Scholars Calls for Revoking the 1619 Project Pulitzer Prize**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=660964f45f&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Federalist_
“An impressive array of academics associated with the National Association of Scholars signed a letter to the Pulitzer Prize Board calling for it to revoke the prize it ceremoniously awarded to Nikole Hannah-Jones this year for her lead essay in The New York Times’ deeply troubled and historically challenged 1619 Project,” Glenn Stanton writes. “Hannah-Jones and the Times secretly deleted the most fundamental claim of her lead essay for the project: that slavery was the central reason for our nation’s founding.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=864d3aae49&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a5e1c48d5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8c54200690)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: 6-3 conservative majority kills climate action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Democrats need to pull out all the stops.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG) Friend, Despite multiple members testing positive for COVID-19, the Senate Judiciary Committee will begin hearings for Trump's third Supreme Court nominee, Amy Coney Barrett, on Monday. Barrett, whose father spent most of his career as an attorney for Shell Oil, would give corporate fossil fuel interests a 6-3 conservative majority on the Supreme Court -- more than enough to kill climate legislation. (And by the way, the Court has just announced they'll consider a case in 2021 that could make it harder to hold fossil fuel companies accountable for climate change.) Most Americans agree that the next justice should be named by the winner of the 2020 election, which is already underway. It is unconscionable for Republicans to try to ram through a Supreme Court nominee as early ballots are being cast across the country and while multiple members of the committee are testing positive for the coronavirus. **[If Trump successfully appoints Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, Democrats in 2021 must eliminate the filibuster and expand the court. Sign on to show your support.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1014?t=3&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1014?t=4&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG)
---
If confirmed, Amy Coney Barrett will be the fifth justice on the bench -- alongside Justices Alito, Roberts, Gorsuch, and Kavanaugh -- to have been nominated by a president who lost the popular vote. It's a balance that doesn't reflect the will of the people, and now, the fate of the planet quite literally hangs in it.
If Democrats succeed in taking the White House and Senate, they must use every tool at their disposal to ensure that America can effectively mobilize against the climate crisis at the speed and scale that science demands. That means pulling out all the stops -- from eliminating the filibuster to adding more seats to the bench -- to keep the Supreme Court from becoming a tool for blocking climate action.
**[Sign on to show your support for eliminating the filibuster and expanding the Supreme Court.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1014?t=5&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG)**
Thank you,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Founder, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1014?t=6&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3550%2E53494%2Efs2FnG). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Let's go vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
To anyone who's ever put their name on the ballot (and I know that's many of you), you know why this was a BIG week in Indiana. Early voting began on | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/were-doing-this-together-469806?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Let's Go Vote_** To anyone who's ever put their name on the ballot (and I know that's many of you), you know why this was a BIG week in Indiana. Early voting began on Tuesday, and we're already seeing strong turnout statewide.

To avoid the lines, I’d recommend going to cast you ballot now. Our entire Republican team -- from **President Trump** to **Governor Holcomb** to **Todd Rokita** to your local members of Congress to your state representatives and senators to the local candidates in your county -- all need and would appreciate your support. We’ve put together a website for you to easily find your early voting locations and hours. You can access it here - [https://action.indiana.gop/ev-in-person/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fcec719e85&e=1acd9bb3d6). And another reason why it was a big week in Indiana politics -- our own Hoosier vice president, **Mike Pence** , debated on the national stage. **Vice President Pence** made Hoosiers incredibly proud on Wednesday night, and expertly communicated the record of results he and **President Trump** have delivered the American people. He has done Indiana proud with his leadership of the Coronavirus task force, and I know he’ll continue to make us proud for another four years.

But first, we must vote.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

_**PHOTO:** This week, **Chairman Hupfer **_spoke at the Marion County Republican Party Fall Dinner. They're working countywide to deliver Election Day victories and ensure Republicans leaders continue to deliver results - from the Statehouse to the White House!
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_More Hoosier Jobs Are On The Way!_** As **Governor Holcomb **continues to build One Indiana for All, one of his top priorities is bringing more great jobs and opportunities to Hoosiers. On Tuesday, he joined executives from Ohio-based Phillips Tube Group, a welded steel tube manufacturer, to cut the ribbon and celebrate the company's new Richmond facility!

Thanks to our state's business friendly environment, Phillips Tube Group announced plans to establish its first operation in Indiana. The company invested $8.2 million to renovate and equip its new 109,000-square-foot facility in Richmond, with plans to create new Hoosier jobs.

As our state continues getting back on track, **Gov. Holcomb** is working hard to create new opportunities for Hoosiers. To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70bdc86c0c&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7dd69d414a&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69480f9847&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| **_New Polling in Governor's Race_** As early voting begins statewide this week, new internal polling released this week from the Holcomb campaign shows **Governor Holcomb** defeating his gubernatorial challengers, winning 60% of the vote in a head-to-head matchup. On the ballot, **Governor Holcomb** leads the Democrat by a 60-21 margin, with the Libertarian receiving 6%.

The poll was conducted between October 4-5 and surveyed 600 likely Hoosier voters throughout the state.

Here are toplines from the poll:

**_Question: If the election for Governor was held today, and the candidates were Eric Holcomb, the Republican candidate, Woody Myers, the Democratic candidate, or Donald Rainwater, the Libertarian candidate, for whom would you vote?_**

Eric Holcomb - 60%
Woody Myers - 21%
Donald Rainwater - 6%

**_Question: Thinking about the job Eric Holcomb is doing as Governor, would you say you approve or disapprove of his performance in office?_**

Approve - 72%
Disapprove - 20%

**_Question: Thinking about the way things are going in the state of Indiana, would you say that Indiana is on the right track or the wrong track?_**

Right Track - 60%
Wrong Track - 31%
Unsure - 9%

The poll, conducted by BK Strategies, surveyed Hoosiers using both landlines and cell phones, and has a margin of error of +/- 4%
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9e8ed4034f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Continued Prayers for President Trump**_
Earlier this week, **President Trump** returned to the White House and he and **First Lady Melania** are well on the road to recovery from COVID-19. While almost fully recovered from the virus, we know that the First Family remains in the thoughts and prayers of countless Hoosiers. There’s still time to [sign our get well card](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fca99a2440&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the President and First Lady. [\--> Sign Our Get Well Card Here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69c9398d36&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=825e84e94f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Early Voting is On!**_ People are voting! That’s right, early in-person voting has started throughout Indiana. Early in-person voting is safe, secure and a great way to beat the lines before November 3. If you’re thinking about voting early, [check out our website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e501ad062c&e=1acd9bb3d6) to find polling locations and times! [\--> Find Your Polling Place Here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c2d028bac&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=edd200eea5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e0f17f73a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Show Your Support: Get Your Holcomb Facebook Frame**_ We’re less than a month away from Election Day. Early voting started on Tuesday ([find your polling place here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc7c0b88a8&e=1acd9bb3d6)), and we have something exciting to share with you. This week, we launched Facebook profile picture frames to show your support for **Governor Eric Holcomb’s** re-election campaign! We’re so excited to share these Facebook profile picture frames with you so that you can show your support for **Governor Holcomb**! Using a Facebook profile picture frame is a simple way to help us spread Governor Holcomb’s message as he continues building One Indiana for All!

Get your "I Support **Governor Holcomb** " Facebook frame here: [www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?selected_overlay_id=311400573263315](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6f626e26a3&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Get your Holcomb for Indiana logo Facebook frame here: [www.facebook.com/profilepicframes/?selected_overlay_id=605062277039831](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6319335e9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Spartz and Rokita Earn Fraternal Order of Police Endorsements**_ Indiana's law enforcement officers put their lives on the line every day to protect and serve Hoosiers across the state. **Victoria Spartz **and **Todd Rokita** actively support our state's police officers and we are proud to announce that they have earned the endorsement of the Fraternal Order of Police.

In Congress, **Victoria Spartz** will work tirelessly to serve the 5th District's public safety officers and their families. That's why the Noblesville Fraternal Order of Police is proud to endorse her in this year's election. Find out more about their endorsement [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ca0cf88d71&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**Todd Rokita** will always support our state's law enforcement officers and their families. As attorney general, he will continually fight the radical left's agenda to defund the police. Yesterday, he earned the endorsement of the Indiana State Fraternal Order of Police. Find out more about their endorsement [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=474e8bb778&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[October 15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8d9d4db83c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner
[October 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c56a20c534&e=1acd9bb3d6): Switzerland County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab137be26d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner
[_October 17_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=320e4236a2&e=1acd9bb3d6): Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 20](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b9e2f8cc6&e=1acd9bb3d6): Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=135e9e9afa&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3dd610fd0b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner
_Have an event to add? Please email it to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[welcomes new jobs to Richmond](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=55b1d1f885&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[ announces new grant program to assist adults with disabilities](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=725396a631&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[calls for justice to be served to ISIS terrorists](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b746e348a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[t](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9ed87b1b3&e=1acd9bb3d6)[hanks Secretary of Commerce for presenting grant to Petersburg](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c3238bd74&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** _[hosts Medicare session to help Hoosiers e](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9aec25f08b&e=1acd9bb3d6)_[ _nroll_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=afd351794f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[talks international agricultural trade with Ted McKinney](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3cee3dd155&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** _[commends USDA ReConnect Program Grant for Fountain County](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8a476ed99d&e=1acd9bb3d6)_
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb8e2e44bb&e=1acd9bb3d6)[igns discharge petition to open PPP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=02f76eb584&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** _[votes early with,](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26d40f948d&e=1acd9bb3d6)_[_encouraging others vote as well_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=98d7206988&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[m](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=565eeb8f7b&e=1acd9bb3d6)[eets with the mayor of Tell City](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e09030f3f9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** [attends Orange County GOP rally](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab1196bcf9&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Here are toplines from the poll: Question: If the election for Governor was held today, and the candidates were Eric Holcomb, the Republican candidate, Woody Myers, the Democratic candidate, or Donald Rainwater, the Libertarian candidate, for whom would you vote? Eric Holcomb - 60% Woody Myers - 21% Donald Rainwater - 6% Question: Thinking about the job Eric Holcomb is doing as Governor, would you say you approve or disapprove of his performance in office? Approve - 72% Disapprove - 20% Question: Thinking about the way things are going in the state of Indiana, would you say that Indiana is on the right track or the wrong track? Right Track - 60% Wrong Track - 31% Unsure - 9% The poll, conducted by BK Strategies, surveyed Hoosiers using both landlines and cell phones, and has a margin of error of +/- 4% | | | Continued Prayers for President Trump Earlier this week, President Trump returned to the White House and he and First Lady Melania are well on the road to recovery from COVID-19. While almost fully recovered from the virus, we know that the First Family remains in the thoughts and prayers of countless Hoosiers. There’s still time to for the President and First Lady. | | | | Early Voting is On! People are voting! That’s right, early in-person voting has started throughout Indiana. Early in-person voting is safe, secure and a great way to beat the lines before November 3. If you’re thinking about voting early, to find polling locations and times! | | | Show Your Support: Get Your Holcomb Facebook Frame We’re less than a month away from Election Day. Early voting started on Tuesday (), and we have something exciting to share with you. This week, we launched Facebook profile picture frames to show your support for Governor Eric Holcomb’s re-election campaign! We’re so excited to share these Facebook profile picture frames with you so that you can show your support for Governor Holcomb! Using a Facebook profile picture frame is a simple way to help us spread Governor Holcomb’s message as he continues building One Indiana for All! Get your "I Support Governor Holcomb " Facebook frame here: Get your Holcomb for Indiana logo Facebook frame here: | | | Spartz and Rokita Earn Fraternal Order of Police Endorsements Indiana's law enforcement officers put their lives on the line every day to protect and serve Hoosiers across the state. Victoria Spartz and Todd Rokita actively support our state's police officers and we are proud to announce that they have earned the endorsement of the Fraternal Order of Police. In Congress, Victoria Spartz will work tirelessly to serve the 5th District's public safety officers and their families. That's why the Noblesville Fraternal Order of Police is proud to endorse her in this year's election. Find out more about their endorsement . Todd Rokita will always support our state's law enforcement officers and their families. As attorney general, he will continually fight the radical left's agenda to defund the police. Yesterday, he earned the endorsement of the Indiana State Fraternal Order of Police. Find out more about their endorsement . | | Upcoming Events : Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner : Switzerland County Lincoln Day Dinner : Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner : Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner : Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

subject: Cute Cat Pics
body:
Okay, now that I’ve got your attention: my finance director has set a steep fundraising goal for the month of October. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2d71bc3ac4c6/cute-cat-pics?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Okay, now that I’ve got your attention: my finance director has set a steep fundraising goal for the month of October. We are in the final stretch of the campaign, so we need to get our message to voters ASAP.

I am running on a platform of social, political, and economic justice. When I am elected, I will be there on the House floor, fighting for things like universal healthcare, campaign finance reform, and economic COVID relief for working families. These are things that people care about and that I know they will be receptive to. But they will only know about it if we are able to deliver our message to them.

[Can I count on you to chip in so that we can get our message to everyone across the 16th?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f5b88d6c66&e=140a9b81e7)

My opponent is bankrolled by corporate super PACs and special interest groups, while I have refused that dirty money. He is one of the most anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ Congressmen out there. His office ignores his constituents,, as he would rather be a famous talking head on the national news circuits than do his job**.****That is why we must beat him.** The people of this district deserve better representation and people from all across this country deserve leaders whose hearts are filled with love.

That is why I need you to donate to our campaign today. To help motivate you to help us meet our steepest monthly goal yet, I have included a picture of the cutest cat below.

[Click here to donate to our campaign and help us meet our high October goal.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7eb0252720&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
